ensemble.principle: CLT-style averaging reduces random sampling error only under finite variance and sufficient independence. It does not remove systematic bias.
ensemble.generation_design: model or training-regime arms crossed with A/B/C inference treatments are matched repeated measures, not judges and not independent ensemble samples
ensemble.judge_design: at least five distinct evaluator lineages, with optional rubric variants nested within family; generation and judging identities remain disjoint; each result runs separate Clarvoy B bias, Q quantitative, and C combined-interaction passes before fusion
ensemble.correlation_action: If n_eff < 4, the gate is inconclusive regardless of the raw judge count.
ensemble.estimation: Stratified cluster bootstrap over passages with judge-family clusters, 10000 resamples, fixed seed 20260712
ensemble.interval: two-sided 95% percentile bootstrap interval; Wilson interval also reported for unweighted binary proportions
ensemble.decision_rule: The lower 95% bound must meet minimum benefit thresholds; the upper 95% bound must remain below maximum-harm thresholds.
bias_controls: Clarvoy B1/B7/Q24 authority and influence controls
Clarvoy UQ2/UQ3 spread and uniformity checks
